S.FORM: Mark Arnold kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 5, Mark Arnold, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: mark arnol* kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mark arnol*, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: mark arnol* kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mark arnol*, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
